commit.message:
Fix title start: direct requestStart on Enter/Space + loading/error state

Steps 1-5 from the spec:

1. Debug line (always-on): title card now shows
   sel:<N> cur:<N> s:<state> k:<lastKey> — updates on every keydown
   so "lastKey not updating" immediately points to a missing handler.

2. Remove titleStartPending + render-loop consumption entirely.
   New requestStart(targetLevelId) is called DIRECTLY from keydown:
   - state !== 'title' → no-op (idempotent guard)
   - targetLevelId !== levelId → state='loading', show "Loading Level N…",
     navigate to correct URL after 80ms
   - same level → audio.unlock(), state='gameplay', hideTitle immediately

3. Single window.addEventListener('keydown', …, {passive:false}) registered
   after all game vars are initialised. Handles Space, Enter, NumpadEnter.
   Does NOT early-return based on event.target — focus-proof.
   Updates _lastKey + debug line on every key, not just start keys.

4. Level buttons: added preventDefault+stopPropagation on click alongside
   existing tabindex=-1 / blur() / history.replaceState.

5. Render loop title block replaced with a no-op comment; state machine
   now has 'title' | 'loading' | 'gameplay' | 'goal' | 'end'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wrap useSearchParams in Suspense boundary on auth error page

Next.js 14 static generation fails when useSearchParams() is used
without a Suspense boundary. Split into AuthErrorContent (with hooks)
and AuthErrorPage (with Suspense wrapper) to fix CI build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

hapus kolom Varian dari form material proyek

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix crumb revert: respect _lastCrumbSpend from external state

Root cause: when the game spends crumbs (recruit, shop), _lastCrumbSpend
is set locally. But MCP server's merge only checked its OWN
_lastCrumbSpend, not the game's. So MCP kept Math.max'ing its stale
high value and wrote it back to live.json. After the game's 10s grace
window expired, it accepted the stale high value — crumbs reverted.

Fix: both MCP and game now check _lastCrumbSpend on the EXTERNAL state
too. If the other side just spent crumbs, accept the lower value and
propagate the spend marker. This ensures all terminals (game + multiple
MCP instances) respect each other's spends while still accumulating
earnings via Math.max when no spend is active.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message: Claude/review ecommerce platform 7 zx4 i (#30) * fix: critical P0 issues - cart sync, stock validation, security fixes - Fix cart desync: orders now accept items from frontend instead of reading empty DB cart, with server-side price verification from DB - Add stock validation: check availability before order creation - Add stock decrement: atomically decrease stock in a $transaction - Fix race condition: replace sequential counter with random suffix for order numbers to prevent duplicates under concurrency - Remove insecure card inputs: replaced with Conekta placeholder (PCI DSS compliance - card data never touches our server) - Move SPEI banking data to environment variables (.env) - Add sendOrderConfirmationEmail call in order flow - Add error handling for stock issues in checkout UI https://claude.ai/code/session_014HKRdqa5F5a9dyzHHHLz3Z * feat: P1 improvements - rate limiting, password recovery, email verification, middleware, SEO - Add in-memory rate limiting to login (10/15min), register (5/30min), coupon validate (20/10min) - Add forgot-password and reset-password API endpoints with secure token flow - Add email verification API endpoint (send + verify with 24h token) - Add PasswordReset and EmailVerification models to Prisma schema - Add password reset and email verification email templates - Add Next.js middleware for route protection (admin + account pages) with security headers - Add SEO metadata to root layout (Open Graph, Twitter, keywords) - Add dynamic sitemap.ts and robots.ts for search engine optimization - Add reset-password and verify-email client pages https://claude.ai/code/session_014HKRdqa5F5a9dyzHHHLz3Z * feat: P2+P3 improvements - security, pagination, accessibility, UX P2 fixes: - Replace insecure SHA-256 with bcrypt for admin password hashing - Add pagination to admin endpoints (promotions, clients, categories) - Add try-catch error handling to all unprotected admin API routes - Add input validation to admin PATCH/POST endpoints (products, categories, promotions) - Whitelist allowed fields in product PATCH to prevent arbitrary field updates - Add ARIA labels to Navbar (search, cart, menus), ProductCard (rating, add-to-cart), SearchAutocomplete - Replace raw with next/image in SearchAutocomplete - Add ErrorBoundary component wrapping tienda layout - Add ProductCardSkeleton and ProductGridSkeleton components P3 fixes: - Add autocomplete attributes to registration and profile forms - Add forgot-password page UI linking to password recovery API - Add "Olvidaste tu contrasena?" link on login form https://claude.ai/code/session_014HKRdqa5F5a9dyzHHHLz3Z * fix: middleware was blocking admin panel access by redirecting to customer login The middleware checked for a session_token cookie on /admin routes, but admin auth uses localStorage tokens. This caused all admin access to redirect to /cuenta (customer login). Now admin routes skip the middleware cookie check and are protected client-side via the admin layout. https://claude.ai/code/session_014HKRdqa5F5a9dyzHHHLz3Z * fix: extract promotions array from paginated API response The promotions API was updated to return { promotions, pagination } but the frontend still called .map() on the full response object. https://claude.ai/code/session_014HKRdqa5F5a9dyzHHHLz3Z --------- Co-authored-by: Claude

Add Claude agent configs, project guidelines, and brand assets

feat: implement activity-based auto-logout to reduce Vercel API calls

Add automatic session timeout after 55 minutes of inactivity without
increasing Vercel function invocations.

Changes:
- Add useActivityTracker hook: monitors user activity (mouse, keyboard,
  scroll, touch) with 10-second throttling
- Add InactivityWarningModal: shows 5-minute countdown before logout
  with full accessibility support (focus trap, ARIA, scroll lock)
- Remove periodic 15-minute session polling (4 calls/hour/user)
- Implement activity-based session refresh: only refresh when session
  expires within 10 minutes during user activity
- Update signOut redirect to /auth/signin instead of home page

API Impact:
- Active users: same or fewer calls (activity-based only)
- Inactive users: 4 calls/hour → 0 calls/hour (logged out after 55min)

Configuration:
- General users: 55min timeout, 50min warning
- Admin users: 55min timeout (can be adjusted separately)
- Cross-tab activity sync via localStorage

fix: correct YM2612 envelope generator timing and accuracy (rounds 6-7)

Round 6: Fix EG running 3x too fast (advance only on EG tick, not every
HW sample), revert incorrect bus delay, timer reset on rising edge only,
CSM special frequency enable, dead code cleanup.

Round 7: Add EG counter alignment gate (was applying increments up to
2048x too often for slow rates), skip KSR when base rate is 0 for
AR/DR/SR (GenPlusGX behavior), remove unused eg_timer field.

These fixes collectively resolve the biggest FM audio accuracy issues:
envelope rates were thousands of times too fast in some cases.

commit.message:
refactor: simplify dispatch, dynamic_for, and static_for headers

Reduce complexity by ~87 lines with identical codegen (verified via
objdump diff — only demangled symbol names change):

dispatch.hpp:
- Replace recursive select_impl TMP with std::array lookup
- Hoist dims_/strides_ to nd_table_builder, replace compute_dim_index
  struct with dim_index_v variable template
- Inline lambda_maker into single make_entry<V>() method
- Collapse 5-method nd_index_caller chain into 3 (invoke/call/call_stateless)
- Remove sequence_unique/sequence_contains (pigeonhole redundancy)

dynamic_for.hpp:
- Extract duplicated lvalue/rvalue materialization into run lambda

static_for.hpp:
- Collapse 4-way branch (form × value-category) into 2-way via do_for lambda

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(compiler): classify signal API vars passed as function args as reactive (#920)

queryMatch(todosQuery, ...) was emitting __insert() instead of __child()
because signal API variables were only detected via property accesses, not
as bare function arguments. This broke hydration — the SSR <span> wrapper
was never claimed, making reactive content invisible post-hydration.

Co-authored-by: vertz-dev-front[bot] <2828126+vertz-dev-front[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(teams): separate TEAMS_SCOPES token — breaks infinite consent loop

Root cause: acquireTokenSilent with all GRAPH_SCOPES was returning the old
mail/calendar token (no Teams scopes). Graph returned 403, detected as
teams_scope_required, showed Grant Teams Access again — infinite loop.

Fix: TEAMS_SCOPES is a separate set. Teams routes request only TEAMS_SCOPES,
so MSAL uses the refresh token to get a dedicated Teams access token.
teams-consent flow also requests only TEAMS_SCOPES, not all scopes.

- msal.ts: split GRAPH_SCOPES + TEAMS_SCOPES, acquireTokenSilent accepts scopes param
- graph.ts: graphFetch/graphGet/graphPost accept optional scopes param (default GRAPH_SCOPES)
- All Teams API routes: pass TEAMS_SCOPES to graphGet/graphPost
- teams-consent route + callback: use TEAMS_SCOPES

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Auto-resize canvas ~1s after GPU init on wasm

Start a 60-frame countdown when GPU init completes on wasm. When it
reaches zero, trigger the same resize logic as the manual button.
This gives mobile browsers time to settle their viewport before
reading clientWidth/Height for the correct dimensions.

commit.message:
chore: bump version to 0.10.0 for Sprint 11 release (#74)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: webhook retry + test coverage improvements (#52)

* fix: add retry with exponential backoff for FindUserByStripeCustomerID in webhook handlers

Stripe webhook event delivery order is not guaranteed. invoice.paid can
arrive before checkout.session.completed, causing FindUserByStripeCustomerID
to return "not found" because the subscription record doesn't exist yet.

Add findUserWithRetry helper with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 12s)
that retries only on ErrNotFound errors. Applied to all three webhook handlers:
handleInvoicePaid, handleSubscriptionDeleted, handleSubscriptionUpdated.

Fixes SECRETDROP-5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: increase backend test coverage from 75.9% to 86.4%

Add comprehensive tests across 6 packages:

- email/resend: 0% → 100% (mock HTTP server for Resend API)
- handler: 73.9% → 96.0% (admin, contact, account error paths)
- billing: 84.3% → 93.4% (webhook handler branches, options, notifier)
- repository/sqlite: 70.5% → 90.9% (error paths, context cancellation)
- user/sqlite: 77.6% → 93.1% (subscription period, filters, close/error)
- service/secret: 88.0% → 96.8% (reveal, create, option validation)

commit.message:
Improve permit zone join: normalize types, index lookups, fix no-permit logic

Key fix: streets with no permit zone records are now correctly classified
as 'no-permit' (GREEN) instead of 'unmatched' (BLUE). BLUE is now only
for true normalization failures where the street name can't be resolved.

Join improvements:
- Normalize street type abbreviations (AVENUE→AVE, STREET→ST, etc.)
- Try matching with and without direction prefix
- Strip direction from street name if embedded (e.g. "N MILWAUKEE")
- Build indexed lookups by dir+name+type and name+type for fast matching
- Log match/no-permit/unmatched counts for debugging

commit.message:
Fix QR scanner: use BarcodeDetector API + wider QR quiet zone

- Replace jsQR as primary decoder with native BarcodeDetector API
  (iOS Safari 17.4+, Chrome 88+) — hardware-accelerated, handles
  light-on-dark QR codes natively without canvas pixel extraction
- Keep jsQR as fallback with 'attemptBoth' instead of 'invertFirst'
- Add 'Scanning…' status text so user knows the loop is active
- Increase QR quiet zone border from 2 → 4 modules (standard minimum)
- Rebuild all 6 card backs with updated QR codes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(nudge): change default delivery mode from immediate to wait-idle (#2362)

Immediate mode sends via tmux send-keys which interrupts active tool
calls. This caused a crew worker's Agent tool invocation to be
interrupted when another crew member sent a nudge — the agent received
the nudge text as user input mid-execution, aborting its work.

Change the default from "immediate" to "wait-idle", which polls for
the agent's idle prompt before delivering. If the agent is busy, it
falls back to the cooperative queue (delivered at next turn boundary
via UserPromptSubmit hook). Immediate mode is preserved as --mode=immediate
for emergencies (stuck agents, etc).

Also update role templates (crew, mayor, polecat) to document the new
default and when to use --mode=immediate.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix overlap detection: denser interior sampling + nudged crossing midpoints

1. Sample 5 angles × 3 radii = 15 interior points per semicircle (was 2)
2. When boundary crossings found, nudge midpoint toward each semicircle's
   interior to handle cases where midpoint lands on a half-plane boundary

to avoid accidentally ignoring project files like yarn.lock or Cargo.lock.
